title: Strolid Sales & Service BDC: The Smarter Solution for Automotive Dealers
summary: Strolid offers a smarter Business Development Center (BDC) solution for automotive dealers, combining expert human agents, advanced AI technology, and seamless CRM integration to overcome the challenges of traditional in-house and outsourced BDC models. It provides 24/7 coverage, fast response times, and proprietary AI built on dealership-specific data to enhance customer interactions and drive sales.
text:
Strolid Sales & Service BDC: 
The Smarter Solution for 
Automotive Dealers
Transform your Business Development Center with a solution that combines 
expert human agents, advanced technology & AI, and seamless CRM 
integration4delivering results that traditional in-house and outsourced 
BDC models simply cannot match.
The BDC Challenge: Why Traditional Models Fall 
Short
In-House BDC Struggles
Constant hiring and recruitment costs
High turnover and training expenses
Inconsistent performance and quality
Limited visibility into activities
Scheduling gaps and missed leads
Traditional Outsourced BDC Issues
Generic scripts lack personalization
No real-time CRM integration
Limited dealership knowledge
Delayed response times
Poor transparency into conversations
Dealers need a solution that eliminates these pain points while delivering consistent, measurable results. That's exactly what 
Strolid provides. A Full Service BDC that your in-house BDC can not compete with. 
Complete CRM Transparency: Know 
Everything
Direct Note Integration
Every conversation automatically synced to your CRM with detailed notes
Total Visibility
See exactly what customers said and how agents responded
Full Accountability
Track performance metrics and conversation quality in real-time
Unlike traditional BDC solutions that leave you guessing, Strolid pushes comprehensive 
conversation notes directly from agent interactions into your CRM. This unprecedented 
transparency gives you complete visibility into the work being done and the actual customer 
conversations happening on your behalf. No more wondering if leads are being handled 
properly4you'll have proof of every interaction. Full Transparency so you never miss the 
customer's intentions.
CRM Notes Integration Example

Our Technology Advantage: AI-Powered Agent 
Excellence
Intelligent Dialer
Automatically pops up on agent screens with customer 
information ready to go
Built-In Domain Knowledge
Your dealership's specific rules, inventory, pricing, and 
processes at their fingertips
Real-Time Copilot
AI coaching guides agents through conversations with best 
practices and suggestions
Strolid GPT
Domain-specific AI trained exclusively on your data4nobody 
else has access to this intelligence
Our proprietary technology stack transforms good agents into great ones. The copilot and Strolid GPT leverage AI built 
specifically on your dealership's unique data, giving agents an unfair advantage that competitors cannot replicate. This is your 
competitive edge, delivered through every customer interaction.
Strolid Dialer Interface

Speed to Lead: Instant Assignment & Response
24/7
Always Available
Coverage every hour of every day
5min
Response Time
Personalized contact within minutes
100%
Lead Capture
Never miss an opportunity
One-Click Lead Assignment
Our intelligent lead assignment system allows agents to claim leads with a single 
button click4eliminating delays that cost you sales. The moment a lead comes in, 
our agents can instantly call and text, dramatically increasing engagement rates 
and customer satisfaction.
Studies show that responding within five minutes increases conversion rates by 
400%. With Strolid, you're guaranteed to hit that critical window every single time, 
personalized for each customer, around the clock.
Strolid Never Quits: End the Hiring 
Cycle
No More Recruiting
Stop the endless cycle of job postings, interviews, and background checks
No More Training Costs
Eliminate the time and expense of onboarding new hires every few months
No More Turnover
Our agents are career professionals who don't quit when things get tough
Consistent Performance
Same high-quality service day after day, year after year
The average BDC agent turnover rate in automotive dealerships exceeds 60% annually. That 
means you're constantly hiring, training, and dealing with inconsistent performance. With 
Strolid, you eliminate this pain point completely. Our dedicated agents are committed 
professionals who bring stability and consistency to your operations4something in-house 
teams simply cannot guarantee.
Automotive Expertise: Trained by Industry 
Veterans
Product Knowledge
In-depth training on vehicle 
features, trim levels, 
packages, and competitive 
comparisons
Auto Terminology
Fluency in industry language 
from APR to MSRP, lease vs. 
finance, and technical 
specifications
Sales & Service Skills
Proven techniques for building 
rapport, active listening, and 
consultative selling 
approaches
Objection Handling
Mastery of overcoming price 
concerns, trade-in questions, 
timing issues, and competitive 
offers
Strolid agents receive extensive training from automotive industry experts who understand the nuances of selling cars. We don't 
just teach scripts4we develop true automotive professionals who can navigate complex conversations and deliver the 
personalized experience today's customers demand.
We Hire Nice People, Not Train 
People to Be Nice
"Attitude and personality cannot be taught. We select agents who genuinely care 
about helping customers, then we give them the tools and training to excel in 
automotive."
Empathy First
Natural people-persons who enjoy helping others
Positive Attitude
Professionals who bring energy and enthusiasm to every interaction
Customer-Focused
Committed to delivering satisfaction in every conversation
This philosophy is our secret weapon. While competitors try to train cold callers to sound 
friendly, we start with genuinely warm, personable professionals. Combined with 
automotive expertise and our AI-powered tools, this creates an unstoppable customer 
experience that drives results.
Your Data, Your Advantage: Proprietary AI 
Intelligence
Strolid Copilot & GPT
Our AI technology is built exclusively on your dealership's domain-
specific data4information that no competitor can access. This creates a 
powerful competitive moat around your customer interactions.
Your inventory specifics: Real-time knowledge of what's on your lot
Your pricing strategy: Understands your market positioning
Your customer history: Leverages past interactions for 
personalization
Your unique processes: Follows your exact workflows and preferences
This isn't generic AI that anyone can use. This is your private intelligence 
engine, giving your BDC capabilities that traditional solutions cannot 
replicate.
Exclusive Access: Your proprietary data stays 
yours. Strolid's AI learns from your specific 
dealership information, creating custom 
intelligence that only benefits you4never shared 
with competitors.
Choose Excellence: The Strolid BDC Advantage
24/7 Coverage
Never miss a lead, day or night
5-Minute Response
Personalized contact when it matters
Complete CRM Integration
Total transparency into every conversation
Zero Turnover
Stable, experienced professionals
Automotive Experts
Trained by industry veterans
Proprietary AI
Your data, your competitive advantage
Stop settling for traditional BDC solutions that create more problems than they solve. Strolid delivers the perfect combination of 
expert human agents, cutting-edge technology, and seamless integration4eliminating the headaches of in-house management 
while outperforming generic outsourced alternatives.
Visit us at NADA 2025 to see how Strolid can transform your dealership's customer engagement and drive measurable ROI.
Strolid Service BDC: Same 
Powerful Technology 
Foundation
Intelligent dialer with dealer information and rules
Real-time scheduler integration and transparency
Proven efficiency that drives results
All four options leverage the same advanced dialer technology, dealer-
specific rules, and efficiency tools that power our sales BDC4ensuring 
consistent performance regardless of which model you choose.
Service BDC: Flexible Solutions for Every 
Customer Expectation
Your customers expect you to pick up the phone. Strolid Service BDC delivers four flexible options to meet your 
needs:
1
AI-Powered Service BDC
Intelligent automation handles routine service inquiries
Instant appointment scheduling 24/7
Cost-effective solution for high-volume calls
2
AI + Human Co-Pilot
Best of both worlds: AI efficiency with human touch
AI assists agents with real-time guidance
Perfect balance of automation and personalization
3
Human-Only Service BDC
Dedicated human agents for every interaction
Maximum personalization and relationship building
Ideal for premium service experiences
4
After-Hours Service Calls
Never miss a service call with Strolid
24/7 coverage when your team is unavailable
Capture every opportunity outside business hours
